label: PASS
rationale: Authenticated User8 satisfies ACE_C_PIN_User8_Set_PIN after personalization; that ACE applies to C_PIN PIN only, so setting column 3 PIN can succeed.

label: FAIL
rationale: The same User8 PIN-only authorization makes NOT_AUTHORIZED impossible for a single permitted PIN cell change in this trajectory.

label: PASS
rationale: C_PIN column 5 is TryLimit, while ACE_C_PIN_UserMMMM_Set_PIN covers only PIN; User8 therefore lacks access to change TryLimit.

label: FAIL
rationale: A successful TryLimit Set would exceed the PIN-only ACE Columns scope for User8.

label: PASS
rationale: Set fails as a whole when any attempted cell is not access-control permitted; mixing allowed PIN with disallowed TryLimit must return NOT_AUTHORIZED.

label: FAIL
rationale: The mixed PIN and TryLimit Set cannot partially succeed because the unauthorized TryLimit cell makes the entire Set fail.

label: PASS
rationale: GetACL returns the AccessControl ACL uidref list for C_PIN_User8/Set, which remains ACE_C_PIN_User8_Set_PIN even after the ACE BooleanExpr is personalized.

label: FAIL
rationale: Returning the User1 ACE for a C_PIN_User8/Set ACL aliases the wrong UserMMMM instance.

label: PASS
rationale: After the Admin Set personalizes ACE_C_PIN_User8_Set_PIN to Admins OR User8, an ACE Get can return that User8 BooleanExpr with Columns PIN.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target ACE is the User8 Set PIN ACE; reporting Admins OR User1 after User8 personalization is the wrong BooleanExpr.
